summary: Korean HWP/HWPX form-fill MCP server. Client-agnostic (Claude Desktop, Codex, Antigravity 2.0). Python. v1 headless fill, v2 COM live-apply via pyhwpx put_field_text. Differentiators: inline-blank fill, merged-cell 2D understanding, review-then-apply.
note: This run is plan-first. Build loop starts only after user approves PLAN.md and answers the open questions in section 10. All stories passes:false.

stories.title: Plan & scope approval gate
acceptanceCriteria: PLAN.md exists with architecture, MCP tool API, data model, roadmap, test strategy
prd.json exists with concrete task-specific acceptance criteria per story
User has reviewed PLAN.md and answered the 5 open questions (section 10)
Repo location, python-hwpx-vs-own-engine decision, and matching-key decision are confirmed

stories.title: Repo scaffold + packaging
acceptanceCriteria: Directory layout matches PLAN.md section 4 (hangeul_core, hangeul_mcp, tests, docs)
pyproject.toml defines package + console entrypoint 'hangeul-mcp'
LICENSE (MIT), README.md, .gitignore present
git repo initialized; `pip install -e .` (or uv sync) succeeds with no error
Sample fixtures copied into tests/fixtures (blank + filled 강사카드)

stories.title: OWPML container I/O (byte-preserving) + substrate decision
acceptanceCriteria: Spike evaluates python-hwpx as substrate; decision recorded in docs/architecture.md (adopt or use own engine)
unpack/repack preserves mimetype as first entry with STORED compression
XML declaration (standalone="yes") preserved byte-for-byte after repack
Round-trip test: repack of untouched file is byte-identical to original (or documented minimal diff)
test_owpml passes

stories.title: Form analyzer (tables, cells, spans, paraPr, charPr)
acceptanceCriteria: analyze() returns tables with cells addressed by rowAddr/colAddr and colSpan/rowSpan
Detects empty cells, bullet paragraphs (heading type=BULLET), and charPr spacing
Golden test on 강사카드(양식).hwpx reproduces the known 표2 field set (성명, 주민등록번호, 학력, 경력×3, 현직, etc.)
test_analyze passes

stories.title: Form understanding: 2D label-value mapping (merged-cell aware)
acceptanceCriteria: Maps labels to their value cells including label-above-value and merged (span) layouts
Emits FieldSchema per PLAN.md section 5 with field kind classification
On the 강사카드(양식) fixture, correctly identifies 성명/직위/휴대전화 value cells (not adjacent labels)
test_understand passes

stories.title: Inline-blank detector (mid-sentence / mid-cell blanks)
acceptanceCriteria: Detects patterns like '∘ ___ 을 졸업하시고' and '은행명: ___ 계좌번호: ___' as kind=inline_blank with insert positions
Distinguishes inline_blank from empty_cell and bullet_item
Golden test on the 강사카드(양식) narrative rows (학력/경력/현직) passes
test_inline passes

stories.title: Format-preserving fill engine (set/append/inline)
acceptanceCriteria: Fills empty_cell (set), bullet_item (append after marker, no duplicate '-'/'∘'), inline_blank (mid-run insert)
Multi-line values become real paragraphs/lineBreaks (no raw \n inside <hp:t>)
Spacing normalization option produces spacing=0 without affecting untouched runs
Round-trip test: filled fields present AND all untouched regions byte-identical AND well-formed AND mimetype/declaration preserved
test_fill passes

stories.title: MCP server (v1 headless) via FastMCP stdio
acceptanceCriteria: Server built on official MCP Python SDK (FastMCP), stdio transport
Exposes tools: detect_format, analyze_form, fill_form, extract_text with JSON schemas
An MCP client smoke test (or mcp dev/inspector) lists the 4 tools and calls fill_form end-to-end on a fixture
Tools are pure (params in -> JSON out), no client-specific assumptions

stories.title: Client-agnostic config docs + verification
acceptanceCriteria: docs/clients/ contains registration snippets for Claude Desktop, Codex, and Antigravity 2.0
Server starts via the documented stdio command for each client
README documents that only MCP tools are used (max client compatibility)
At least one non-Claude client (Codex or Antigravity) verified to list tools

stories.title: COM bridge (v2) via pyhwpx with environment guard
acceptanceCriteria: hwp/com.py attaches to a running 한글 instance, get_field_list works, put_field_text(dict) fills fields
Off-Windows or 한글-not-installed: import/guard returns available:false gracefully (no crash)
Security file-access prompt handling documented (FilePathCheckerModule)
Guarded integration test passes on a machine with 한글 (skips elsewhere)

stories.title: apply_to_open_hwp MCP tool + review->apply workflow
acceptanceCriteria: hwp_status and apply_to_open_hwp tools exposed
apply runs format-preserving preprocessing on values before put_field_text
Returns applied[] and skipped[] with reasons; returns needs_field_registration when no named fields exist
End-to-end demo: analyze -> (LLM draft) -> apply to open 한글 fills the live document one-shot

stories.title: Review->apply Agent Skill (thin orchestration)
acceptanceCriteria: skills/SKILL.md guides: analyze_form -> draft -> user review -> fill_form or apply_to_open_hwp
Skill instructs value generation to respect field kind (bullets, inline, checkbox)
Documented usage from Claude Desktop

stories.title: CI, golden fixtures, .hwp policy, release
acceptanceCriteria: CI runs tests on push (GitHub Actions) green
.hwp input policy implemented per user decision (reject-with-guidance or auto-convert)
README quickstart verified; version tag cut
Coverage of core modules documented

decisions.substrate: own byte-preserving engine (core) + python-hwpx for XSD validation & security hardening
decisions.hwp_input: v1 auto-convert to HWPX (COM-first, LibreOffice/H2Orestart fallback)
